case_title: BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE VS. FREDDY A FUENTES et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTES, FREDDY A
NOTICE OF DATE, TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-07-2013. ***CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.*** ELIZABETH MACDONALD APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REPRESENTATION FROM PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: RVELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
